templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
templates.description: A standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers confidentiality obligations between two parties sharing proprietary information.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: The cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Parties fill in their business terms here; this document incorporates the Mutual-NDA standard terms by reference to form a complete executed agreement.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: A standard agreement for cloud-hosted software and services, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Covers subscription terms, data handling, SLAs, acceptable use, and liability for SaaS vendors and their customers.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: A standard agreement for early-stage design partnerships between a software vendor and a design partner customer. Governs the terms under which a design partner tests and provides feedback on a product in development.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: A standard service level agreement defining uptime commitments, incident response times, and remedies for service failures. Intended to be incorporated by reference into a Cloud Service Agreement or similar contract.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: A standard agreement for professional and consulting services engagements. Covers statements of work, deliverables, intellectual property ownership, payment terms, and liability for service providers and their clients.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: A standard data processing agreement addressing GDPR and other privacy law requirements. Defines the obligations of a data processor acting on behalf of a data controller, including security measures, sub-processors, and data subject rights.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: A standard agreement for licensing on-premises or self-hosted software. Covers license grants, restrictions, maintenance and support, intellectual property, and liability for software vendors and their licensees.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: A standard agreement for reseller, referral, or technology partnership arrangements. Covers partner rights and obligations, revenue sharing, branding, intellectual property, and termination.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: A standard short-term trial or evaluation agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract. Covers pilot scope, duration, fees, data handling, and transition to a full agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: A standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement for vendors that handle protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity or another business associate. Covers permitted uses of PHI, security obligations, breach notification, and termination.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: A standard addendum to be attached to a Cloud Service Agreement or Software License Agreement when the vendor's product includes AI or machine learning features. Addresses AI-specific concerns such as training data, output accuracy, acceptable use, and liability.
